channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Drains, 26th June
item.description:
Outside 28 sandfeild road, nearly been flooded twice as all road drains are blocked and all water from road enters my drive like a river as seen in photo

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep hole like a sinkhole, 26th June
item.description:
Outside no. 50 Brighton Road, Cheltenham GL52 6BA

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 49, Brighton Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overgrown, causing damage to pavement, headheight branches and encroaching on my property. Please can it be tidied up and cut back. Many thanks, 26th June
item.description:
Next to the bus stop by the Tesco express in coopers edge.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lobleys Drive, Hucclecote, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Has been hit, 26th June
item.description:
The bollard near Sun Street Cheltenham has been knocked over fully

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 55-60, Tewkesbury Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Sign facing houses rather than pathway it was meant to be replaced by 5th April this year, 26th June
item.description:
On footpath between 75 and 77 park avenue. Was reported in 2025 and was meant to be replaced by April 5th. It is a no cycle sign which is ignored and causes problems for people exiting properties Reference from last year 22073793
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Park Avenue, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Giant hogweed reported in verge, 26th June
item.description:
Email received by Badgeworth parish council. Location on map estimated: ﻿ ﻿Hi, I was travellingalong Badge Worth Lane earlier today and noticed that there is another outbreak of giant hogweed in the parish. As you know, this is extremely dangerous and a notifiable pest. It is on the left-hand side of the road as you travel from Badge Worth towards Shurdington just after the 50 mile an hour sign.and it’s already at a height of around 6 feet. Please could you make arrangements for it to be removed and made safe. It is about to seed and so will spread rapidly if it’s not dealt with. I should point out I’m a partner of a firm of charted surveyors so I’m well-versed in the issues arising around identifying and dealing with giant hogweed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long skinny tree branch snapped, still attached to tree could fallen further into road or onto person, 26th June
item.description:
St George's road opposite the bus stop and The George hotel

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41-49, Saint Georges Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Tree causing damage/obstruction to pavement or road

item.title: Traffic lights are off, 26th June
item.description:
Junctions between town hall and royal well have no traffic lights
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Promenade, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working

item.title: Crossing audible sound too loud/soft problem, 26th June
item.description:
Stagecoach reports from drivers (13:00hr). No illumination at all.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road marking white lines or studs problem, 26th June
item.description:
Give way road markings require a refresh.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 26th June
item.description:
as you leave Malden Road on your left there is two trees and both of them have grown quite large vegitation around the base of the trunks and is makign it very difficult to see left when you are pulling out, he is wondering if this can be looked into.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loud noise and potential defect in manhole cover, 26th June
item.description:
The inspection chamber cover in the carriageway (located immediately in front of the drive of 111 Leckhampton Rd) produces a loud impact noise every time vehicles pass over it. The repeated impacts are causing significant noise and vibration inside my house. Could it be inspected for movement or a defective seating and repaired if necessary?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 140, Leckhampton Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 26th June
item.description:
Shards of sharp slate pieces (potentially from fallen roofing tiles) on the carrieageway - double tyre blow out has occurred at around 10:20.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See photo, 26th June
item.description:
Opposite side of the road to the maida vale turning, by ar cook / forbes george / CS glass.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mead Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over hanging tree and breaking pavement, 26th June
item.description:
Out side Number 30 Benhall Avenue, Cheltenham GL51 6AE Tree over hang drive and branches falling on to drive, car and ME! Pavement is now so lifted from tree root that my father tripped. The roots are beginning to lift our concrete slab driveway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Benhall Avenue, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The vegetation is too high to see into the roundabout, 26th June
item.description:
No one has cut the vegetation on the roundabout for months and it's so high that all vehicles coming down the slip road at gradual speed are having to fully stop to be able to see into the roundabout if it's safe to proceed. Please can this been sorted ASAP
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Golden Valley Junction, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 26th June
item.description:
CW Rutting/ Depressions 10000 x 1000 x 68mm 2-Way Traffic Lights (CW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 26th June
item.description:
Pothole FW 300x250x40mm approx Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown grass/weeds blocking view of junction, 25th June
item.description:
On the turning into the aldi/ford garage complex. Really dangerous needs cutting
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): East Gable, Tewkesbury
